parents.subject: LU-19545 ec: tight binding parity mirror to data mirror

commit.subject: LU-20080 quota: Check qsd_dev is not NULL before accessing
commit.message:
LU-20080 quota: Check qsd_dev is not NULL before accessing

recovery-small/143 suggests a race condition that could be hit
where qsd_dev is NULL.

In this case qsd_op_end() should just return similar to the
qsd is NULL above.

Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: I7b9964994a959feea4d33f3d3d3d8c6d260c9ec5
